summary: Tested internal linking for city and service pages. 6/8 tests PASSED. CRITICAL BUG: City pages (/daly-city-appliance-repair, /san-francisco-appliance-repair etc) are MISSING the 'Popular Repairs in [City]' section with links to city+service pages. The code for this section exists (lines 1018-1041) but is placed OUTSIDE the city-specific layout block which returns early at line 656. Service pages work correctly - city chips link to city+service pages for services with routes (refrigerator, washer, dryer, dishwasher, oven, wine-cooler, ice-maker) and fall back to city+appliance pages for others (cooktop, freezer, garbage-disposal).

critical.issue: City pages MISSING 'Popular Repairs in [City]' section - the section code (lines 1018-1041) is placed OUTSIDE the city-specific layout block that returns early at line 656, so it never executes for city pages
critical.expected: City pages should have a 'Popular Repairs in [City]' section with links to /{city}-refrigerator-repair, /{city}-washer-repair, etc
critical.actual: Section not present - city pages only have 'Every Major Appliance' cards linking to generic service pages like /refrigerator-repair
critical.fix: Move the 'Popular Repairs' section code (lines 1018-1041) INSIDE the city-specific layout block (before line 656 return statement), or duplicate it within the city layout

test_1_city_page_popular_repairs_section.description: City page should have 'Popular Repairs in Daly City' section

test_2_service_page_city_chips.description: Service page city chips should link to city+service pages

test_3_cooktop_fallback.description: Cooktop service page should fall back to city+appliance links
test_3_cooktop_fallback.actual: No city+cooktop links found, city+appliance links present as expected

test_4_navigation_service_to_city_servic.description: Clicking Daly City chip navigates to city+service page
test_4_navigation_service_to_city_servic.actual: Navigation successful, H1 shows 'Refrigerator Repair in Daly City'

test_5_city_service_page_links.description: City+service page has city chips linking to other city+service pages

test_6_washer_service_city_links.description: Washer service page city chips link to city+washer pages

test_7_sf_city_page_popular_repairs.description: San Francisco city page should have 'Popular Repairs' section
test_7_sf_city_page_popular_repairs.actual: Section NOT found - no city+service links on page

test_8_existing_content_renders.description: Existing city page content renders correctly

code_analysis.root_cause: The 'Popular Repairs' section code (lines 1018-1041 in ApplianceRepairPageNew.js) checks `{isCity && ...}` but is placed AFTER the city-specific layout block that returns early at line 656. The city layout (lines 309-656) has its own return statement, so any code after line 656 never executes for city pages.

action_items: CRITICAL: Add 'Popular Repairs in [City]' section to city-specific layout in ApplianceRepairPageNew.js - move code from lines 1018-1041 INTO the city layout block (before line 656 return) or duplicate it within the city layout
The section should render links to /{city}-{service}-repair for: refrigerator, washer, dryer, dishwasher, oven, wine-cooler, ice-maker
critical_code_review_comments: Code for 'Popular Repairs' section exists at lines 1018-1041 but is unreachable for city pages due to early return at line 656
Service pages correctly implement conditional city+service links based on CITY_SERVICE_SVCS list (lines 944-973)
seo-config.cjs has correct popularRepairsClusterHTML function that generates the same city+service links for prerendered HTML
context_for_next_testing_agent: City pages are missing 'Popular Repairs' section. The code exists but is unreachable. Service page city chips work correctly - linking to city+service for eligible services and city+appliance for others. After fix, retest /daly-city-appliance-repair and /san-francisco-appliance-repair for 'Popular Repairs in [City]' section presence.
rca_of_the_issue: The ApplianceRepairPageNew component has two separate render paths: city-specific layout (lines 309-656) and service layout (lines 660+). The city layout has an early return at line 656, so code at lines 1018-1041 for 'Popular Repairs' never executes for city pages. FIX: Add the Popular Repairs section inside the city-specific layout block before the return statement.
